Restriction: Must be in Counseling and Personnel Services (Master's) program.

Credit Only Granted for. EDSP470 or EDSP601.

EDSP602 Instruction of Students with Severe Disabilities | (3 Credits) Functional assessment procedures and instructional methods for students with severe disabilities.

Restriction: Must be in Special Education (Master's) program.

Credit Only Granted for. EDSP400 or EDSP602.
